{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Planetary Governor
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Planetary Governor]] of [[Visiria]] is a woman.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c25">''The Knight'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Planetary Governor]]'s voice is broadcast over the [[arena]] speakers.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c27">''The Knight'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
